since_last: 67% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +6.80%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 67% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.91% · BTC -4.36% · Gold -3.08% · Nasdaq100 +2.30%. 67% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +6.80%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +6.80%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.44%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MRVL is the standout at +13.20%
cards.body: Leaders: MRVL +13.20%, SMR +10.69%, INTC +10.47%, KLAC +9.53%, MU +9.34%. Laggards: INOD -7.96%, SPCX -5.00%, IBM -4.15%, WDAY -3.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.00% at $182.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.00% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
